primary_changes: Main Squishy support chat now reads window.EMPEROR_ONYX_PERSONALITY_DATA from the expanded onyx_personality_reference.json.
Full Onyx line pools, mood metadata, mood images, relationship canon, support skills, DBT, ADHD, diary-card, attachment/BPD support, rewards, and games support are available to the main chat.
Onyx mood images now appear in the support card, floating button, and floating support header.
Generic Support speaker was replaced by Onyx in chat rendering.
Emperor Onyx data JS files were regenerated from the expanded full personality JSON.
Older Onyx bot-data starter messages and relationship-canon notes were merged into json/bot-data.json.
The runtime remains compact: duplicate /data mirrors, sources_original_unmodified, and game HTML files are excluded.
excluded: Actual game HTML files were not included because the game launcher code was not changed.
sources_original_unmodified was not included because it is archival/provenance material and not needed for GitHub Pages runtime.
Duplicate /data copies were not included; runtime support catalogs live in /json and active browser scripts live in /js.
safety_boundary: Onyx is framed as DBT/ADHD/mental-health skills support and a bridge to care, not licensed therapy, medical care, emergency care, or a replacement for crisis support.
